indicators.name: low ceiling height
indicators.rationale: Low ceiling height can make the space feel cramped and claustrophobic, potentially affecting sleep quality.

indicators.name: hard floor surface
indicators.rationale: Hard floors are less comfortable for sleeping and can cause noise and coldness.

indicators.name: no windows
indicators.rationale: No natural light or ventilation can lead to a stuffy, dark environment that is less conducive to sleep.

indicators.name: no furniture for sleeping
indicators.rationale: The absence of a bed or other furniture for sleeping makes this space unsuitable for sleep.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is marginally adequate for sleep (Primary). The low ceiling height, hard floor, lack of windows, and absence of furniture for sleeping all contribute to a less-than-ideal environment for restful sleep.
